tasks.subject: Task 1: DB — ClusterReservation model + is_reserved column
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ClusterReservation table and is_reserved column to PlasticDebris.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/app/db/models.py`
- Create: `backend/app/db/migrations.py`
- Modify: `backend/app/main.py`

**Verify:** `cd backend && python -c "from app.db.models import ClusterReservation, PlasticDebris; print('OK')"` → OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/db/models.py", "backend/app/db/migrations.py", "backend/app/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python -c \"from app.db.models import ClusterReservation, PlasticDebris; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ClusterReservation table created", "is_reserved column on plastic_debris", "startup migration runs safely"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — Reserve and release endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /api/clusters/reserve and DELETE /api/clusters/{id}/reserve.

**Files:**
- Create: `backend/app/api/routes/clusters.py`
- Modify: `backend/app/main.py`

**Verify:** `cd backend && python -c "from app.api.routes.clusters import router; print('OK')"` → OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/api/routes/clusters.py", "backend/app/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python -c \"from app.api.routes.clusters import router; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reserve endpoint created", "one-per-user enforced", "release endpoint works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend — Collect endpoint (photo + ML + proximity)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /api/clusters/{reservation_id}/collect.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/app/api/routes/clusters.py`

**Verify:** `cd backend && python -c "from app.api.routes.clusters import collect_cluster; print('OK')"` → OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/api/routes/clusters.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python -c \"from app.api.routes.clusters import collect_cluster; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["proximity check enforced", "ML classifier called", "attempt_count incremented on fail", "is_collected set on ML pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Backend — APScheduler expiry job
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every 5 minutes expire stale reservations.

**Files:**
- Create: `backend/app/scheduler.py`
- Modify: `backend/requirements.txt`
- Modify: `backend/app/main.py`

**Verify:** `cd backend && python -c "from app.scheduler import expire_reservations; print('OK')"` → OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/scheduler.py", "backend/requirements.txt", "backend/app/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python -c \"from app.scheduler import expire_reservations; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["apscheduler installed", "expire_reservations function works", "server starts with scheduler"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Backend — Filter reserved debris + cluster response
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /api/users/me/debris returns clusters with source_point_ids, is_reserved, reservation_id.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/app/schemas/user.py`
- Modify: `backend/app/api/routes/users.py`

**Verify:** `cd backend && python -c "from app.schemas.user import DebrisOut; f=list(DebrisOut.model_fields.keys()); assert 'source_point_ids' in f; print('OK')"` → OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/schemas/user.py", "backend/app/api/routes/users.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python -c \"from app.schemas.user import DebrisOut; f=list(DebrisOut.model_fields.keys()); assert 'source_point_ids' in f; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DebrisOut schema updated", "debris endpoint returns clusters", "reserved filter applied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Backend — Sentinel re-verification service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** After satellite scan award eco points if debris gone or revert if still detected.

**Files:**
- Create: `backend/app/services/sentinel_verify.py`
- Modify: `backend/app/api/routes/users.py`

**Verify:** `cd backend && python -c "from app.services.sentinel_verify import verify_collected_debris; print('OK')"` → OK

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/app/services/sentinel_verify.py", "backend/app/api/routes/users.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && python -c \"from app.services.sentinel_verify import verify_collected_debris; print('OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["verify function awards points", "verify function reverts on fail", "called after satellite scan"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Frontend — API service update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update DebrisOut interface and add three new API methods.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/app/services/api.service.ts`

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/app/services/api.service.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DebrisOut updated", "reserveCluster method", "collectCluster method", "releaseReservation method"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Frontend — Map cluster markers with reserve/collect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Map renders clusters with Reserve/Collect popup buttons and proximity check.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/app/components/map/map.ts`
- Modify: `frontend/src/app/components/map/map.html`

**Verify:** `cd frontend && ng build --configuration development 2>&1 | tail -5` → Application bundle generation complete.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/app/components/map/map.ts", "frontend/src/app/components/map/map.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && ng build --configuration development 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clusters render", "reserve button works", "collect button proximity check", "overlay triggered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Frontend — CollectOverlay component

**Goal:** Full-screen photo upload overlay with retry counting and success/fail states.

- Create: `frontend/src/app/components/collect-overlay/collect-overlay.html`

**Verify:** `cd frontend && ng build --configuration development 2>&1 | tail -5` → Application bundle generation complete.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/app/components/collect-overlay/collect-overlay.ts", "frontend/src/app/components/collect-overlay/collect-overlay.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && ng build --configuration development 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["photo upload works", "retry counting correct", "success emits collected", "cancel releases reservation"]}
```
